title: Process-defects report (mechanism 6 — reflection pass, LLM half)
description: Written ONLY by the process-auditor agent (or by the deterministic skeletal fallback when no LLM is available) to docs/qa/process-defects.json. Audits the GATE CHAIN, not the product code. No hard gate keys on the CONTENT of this file — G7 requires only that the file exists and that every P0 defect is resolved or human-waived.

auditedBy.description: Auditor identity, e.g. 'process-auditor (plain subagent)' or 'deterministic-fallback'. MUST be a fresh checker: never the orchestrator or any maker of the work under audit.

inputs.description: Exact paths read (the auditor's allowed read set: docs/qa/process-health.md, trace/process-health.json, docs/qa reports, retro/corrections/*). Anything else here is a protocol violation.

id.description: Sequential process-defect id; never reuse a number, even for withdrawn defects.

class.description: Failure class. First five mirror correction.schema.json failureMode; label-drift = gate label vs executed command diverge; process-bypass = work done outside the governed loop; stale-evidence = committed report/trace older than the code it vouches for.

severity.description: P0 = a gate rendered PASS over absent or false evidence; P1 = a check exists but is too weak / mislabeled / skippable; P2 = hygiene that has not yet let a false PASS through.

pointer.description: Verifiable location: file:line, ledger event ts, or report section.

quote.description: Short verbatim quote from the pointer.

evidence.description: Every defect MUST carry at least one verifiable pointer into the allowed read set. No pointer, no defect.

name.description: process-health metric this defect shows up in (e.g. vacuousPassCount, openCorrections, acceptanceContractCoverage).

expectedMovement.description: Direction + amount the metric should move once fixed (e.g. 'vacuousPassCount 3 -> 0'). The NEXT retro verifies this moved; no movement auto-flags the improvement for revert.

targetFile.description: The gate/script/template the improvement proposal would change. The auditor NEVER edits it directly.

sketch.description: 1-3 sentence fix direction; the exact diff lives in openspec/changes/improve-PD-x/.

proposalDir.description: openspec/changes/improve-PD-<n>/ once the proposal folder is written.

status.description: open = found; proposed = improvement proposal drafted; resolved = Refs: PD-x commit landed AND metric moved; waived = human-signed.

correctionIds.description: Corrections (retro/corrections/) this defect root-causes, if any.
